data.title: Bitfarms Appoints New Chair Amid U.S. Expansion Strategy
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitcoin mining company Bitfarms has announced the appointment of Edie Hofmeister as the new chair of its board, succeeding Brian Howlett, who has served as chair since 2024. Howlett will continue to serve as an independent director. Bitfarms stated that this leadership change is part of the company's strategy to redomicile to the United States, aiming to enhance access to U.S. capital markets, expand its U.S. investor base, and improve eligibility for inclusion in certain stock indices.

data.title: Fed's Kashkari Comments on Trump's Actions Regarding Monetary Policy
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve's Kashkari has expressed that U.S. President Donald Trump's actions concerning the Federal Reserve are related to monetary policy. Kashkari noted that Fed Chair Powell has explained the situation accurately.

data.title: CZ AMA: Beginners to Crypto Should Start Small
data.description: In an AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, stated that beginners and those new to crypto trading should start with small amounts of capital, and he advised beginners against starting immediately with futures and options. He also added that beginners should gradually build their investments.

data.title: CZ AMA: I Advise Against Using My X Posts to Launch Meme Coins
data.description: In an AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, advised against using social media posts from him or He Yi, Binance co-CEO, as a basis for launching meme coins. He expressed that such a strategy has a very low success rate, and it is often unclear who is behind such launches.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Kashkari: Trump's actions against the Fed "are about monetary policy."
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Neshkari believes that President Trump's actions against the Fed are "about monetary policy." Kashkari stated that Fed Chairman Powell explained the matter "accurately." (Jinshi)

data.title: With the midterm elections approaching, the political maneuvering surrounding Trump's policies has become the biggest uncertainty for the US stock market in 2026.
data.description: Ed Clissold, chief U.S. strategist at Ned Davis Research, plans to coin a new term—"Big MAC Trading"—an abbreviation for "Big Midterms Are Coming." He intends to use this concept to encapsulate his view of the core theme for the U.S. stock market in 2026: the policy direction and its impact before and after the congressional elections this fall. President Trump's series of policy-like statements at the beginning of the year clearly indicate that he is focusing on improving the Republican Party's chances of winning the November elections, with his policy tools targeting the hotly debated issue of "affordability" in the U.S. This trend could have a profound impact on the stock market. Take last week's market performance as an example. Trump's demand that credit card issuers cap interest rates at 10%—less than half the current average—caused a sharp drop in bank stocks. His order for defense companies to suspend dividend payments and redirect funds to production also severely impacted the defense sector. And after the government's recent criticism of the Federal Reserve's independence, Wall Street was gripped by panic on Monday. Lissolder wrote in his report: "Policy adjustments targeting specific industries before the midterm elections will be a major risk," and the market is currently unsure how to hedge against such risks. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve's Kashkari: I don't see any incentive for a rate cut in January.
data.description: Federal Reserve's Kashkari does not believe there is "motivation for a rate cut in January," citing the economy's "resilience." (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark plans to develop a data center campus in Texas with a capacity of up to 600MW; the transaction is expected to be completed in Q1.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark announced a definitive agreement to acquire up to 447 acres of land in Brazoria County, Texas, and sign a long-term power transmission facility expansion agreement. This move will enable the company to develop a large-scale data center project with a total capacity of 600 terabit. The transaction is expected to close in the first quarter of 2026, subject to several conditions, including approvals from utility companies and the property. It aims to support the development of a large, next-generation data center campus for artificial intelligence and high-performance computing workloads. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Pakistan signs stablecoin deal with Trump-linked crypto firm
data.description:
Pakistan has partnered with SC Financial Technologies to explore the use of the USD1 stablecoin for cross-border payments within a regulated system.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pakistan-signs-stablecoin-deal/

data.title: CZ AMA: BNB Ecosystem Is Stable, BNB Has Great Potential
data.description: In an AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, stated that the BNB ecosystem is stable and large, encompassing many active builders. He also expressed words of encouragement, saying that BNB has great potential.

data.title: CZ AMA: Altcoin Season Is Definitely Coming
data.description: In an AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, expressed that it is just a matter of time before altcoin season arrives. He stated that altcoin season is definitely going to happen, but specifics such as which coins will be included or how long it will last, these are not easily explainable or predicted.

data.title: CZ AMA: Prediction Market Sector's Newness and Its Fewer Market Makers
data.description: In a livestream AMA on Binance Square, CZ commented on pr4ediction markets—he stated that prediction markets have fewer market makers as the sector is still a new one. He expressed that to his knowledge, prediction markets such as Polymarket only have one or two market makers, and the sector in general is still concentrated on sports events.

data.title: CleanSpark Expands Data Center Projects with Texas Land Acquisition
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark, listed on Nasdaq, has announced the signing of an agreement to acquire 447 acres of land in Brazoria County, Texas. The company has also reached a long-term agreement with a power company to extend transmission facilities. This initiative aims to support the development of a large-scale data center project to meet a demand of 300 MW, with the potential to expand to 600 MW. The transaction is expected to be completed in the first quarter of 2026, pending utility and property-related approvals.

This acquisition marks CleanSpark's second strategic development project in the greater Houston area under ERCOT, with the first being in Austin County. The company is establishing a regional power and infrastructure hub exceeding 890 MW. These locations are designed to support the development of large, next-generation data center campuses to handle artificial intelligence and high-performance computing workloads.

data.title: Indian Authorities Freeze Assets in $3.2 Million Fraud Case
data.description: According to Odaily, the Indian Enforcement Directorate has frozen assets worth $1.3 million, including cryptocurrency holdings, in connection with a $3.2 million fraud case.

data.title: Former Chinese Securities Official Allegedly Involved in ICO Scandal
data.description:
According to Foresight News, a report from CCTV reveals that Yao Qian, the former director of the Technology Supervision Department of the China Securities Regulatory Commission and former director of the Information Center, was implicated in an ICO-related scandal in 2018. Yao reportedly intervened on behalf of a businessman named Zhang, who was conducting an ICO that raised 20,000 ETH. As a token of appreciation, Zhang allegedly transferred 2,000 ETH to Yao.

Investigators discovered a hardware wallet in Yao's office drawer. Additionally, several bank accounts opened by others were found to be shell accounts linked to Yao. One of these accounts received a 10 million yuan transfer, which was traced through multiple layers to a virtual currency trader's account. The funds were ultimately used to purchase a villa in Beijing.

data.title: CZ AMA: Genuine Meme Coins Should Have Historical and Referential Significance
data.description: In an AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, stated that he believes genuine meme coin projects should have historical significance and a memorable story. However, he expressed that only a very small number of meme coin projects truly have value, with a failure rate exceeding 90%. Early investors in meme coin projects face certain risks that they should be aware of, and investors in general need to be responsible for their own choices.

data.title: CZ AMA: Bitcoin Will Definitely Reach $200,000, The Only Question Is When
data.description: In a AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, stated it is only a matter of time before Bitcoin reaches $200,000. He stated that although he is not sure when, he is sure that it will happen.
